decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to its own base_record_id entity_mta-nyct, which is the correct canonical record for MTA New York City Transit. The registry card entity_mta-nyct matches on entity_name ('MTA New York City Transit'), entity_type ('agency' vs 'transit_agency'), and already lists source 20110118_34th_cac3_slides.

Observation already resolves to its own base_record_id entity_federal-transit-administration-lga-aa, which is the correct canonical record for the Federal Transit Administration. The registry card matches on entity_name ('Federal Transit Administration'), acronym ('FTA'), and already lists source 20110118_34th_cac3_slides.

decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to its own base_record_id entity_nyc-dot, which is the correct canonical record for the New York City Department of Transportation. The registry card matches on entity_name ('New York City Department of Transportation'), entity_type ('agency'), shortcut/acronym ('DOT'), and already lists source 20110118_34th_cac3_slides.
